paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.8, with an 11.11% increase from the prior close and a 24.19% decrease over the last 21 sessions. The price is current as of 2026-07-21.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G on 2026-07-20, an 8-K on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes, and an 8-K on 2026-07-13 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson.
